title: Case closed!
negativePrompt: extra people, duplicate character, twin, clone, two of the same person, mirrored figure, background extras, third child, second sister
prompt: Two-shot in @BedroomSisters. @Sara on the LEFT high-fives @Eva on the RIGHT. @Sara grinning: "Case closed, detective Eva!" @Eva proud: "Case closed, really-really-really closed!"
